business_ideas.idea: AI-powered personal clone trained on email/Slack/calls to attend meetings and answer questions
Job-specific AI assistant apps (Harvey for law, Rogu for investment banking, Profound for AEO)

predictions.text: AI will be CEO of a company within 5 years, possibly OpenAI leading this trend
Most major AI companies are already founded; consolidation will happen in next 1-2 years
Wealth gap will widen significantly as AI amplifies advantages for high-agency people vs passive ones
Five-tool CEOs (code, taste, sell, fundraise, recruit) will dominate next generation of startups
